headline: Paramount-WBD deal faces legal hurdle, delays
summary: David Ellison spent eight months persuading Washington that buying Warner Bros. Discovery would strengthen competition in Hollywood, and it worked. The Justice Department closed its antitrust review in June and cleared the deal. However, things have taken an unexpected turn. A group of state ...
